fieldValues.value: **37.** Every `TypeRef.typeId` referenced in `Protocol.targetType` or in any `ProtocolStage.outputType`, for each Protocol in `Package.protocols[]`, must appear in `Package.dependencyRefs` with `definitionType: "type"`. Every `FieldRef.fieldId` in any `ProtocolStage.contributesTo[]` must appear in `Package.dependencyRefs` with `definitionType: "field"`. If `mode === "bundled"`, those Types must be in `Package.types[]` and those Fields in `Package.fields[]`.

sourceRefs.note: Subsection 08-18 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
